component.name: NVIDIA-GUI
component.summary: Linux NVIDIA GPU control center — telemetry, DLSS overrides, per-game tuning

description.p: A community, vendor-unaffiliated Linux GPU control center: live telemetry, driver and kernel-module controls, DLSS overrides, and per-game launch injection. Wayland/X11-native GTK4; runs no proprietary daemon of its own.

Per-game PROTON environment injection stamps launch options so toggles actually take effect; never-lie per-game feature detection reports DLSS-SR, Frame Gen, Reflex, and Ray Tracing as supported / unsupported / unknown with provenance instead of guessing. Kernel-module tuning covers Resizable BAR and persistence mode, and the CSS pipeline is crash-safe-tuned for the NVIDIA Wayland compositor (solid fills, no blur/gradient stalls).
Unaffiliated with NVIDIA Corporation. NVIDIA, GeForce, RTX, and DLSS are trademarks of NVIDIA Corporation, used nominatively here as feature labels.

Initial public release: 9-page sidebar, per-game profiles, DLSS cache/swap, kernel-module + persistence controls, feature detection, async scan, keyboard accelerators, and crash-safe animations tiers.
